Interface AdopterService

All Known Implementing Classes:
AdopterServiceImpl
public interface AdopterService
Manages adopter records within the system, including registration, updates, and removal. Implementations are responsible for validating adopter information before persisting changes.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Adopter>
    adoptedAfter(LocalDate date)
    Returns all adopters who have at least one approved adoption after the given date.
    List<Adopter>
    adoptedAnimal(Animal animal)
    Returns all adopters who have adopted the given animal.
    Adopter
    findById(String id)
    Returns the adopter with the given ID.
    List<Adopter>
    listAll()
    Returns all adopters currently registered in the system.
    void
    register(Adopter adopter)
    Registers a new adopter into the system.
    List<Adopter>
    registeredAfter(LocalDate date)
    Returns all adopters who registered after the given date.
    void
    remove(Adopter adopter)
    Removes an adopter from the system.
    void
    update(Adopter adopter)
    Updates the information of an existing adopter record.

  • Method Details

    • register

      void register(Adopter adopter)
      Registers a new adopter into the system. Throws an exception if the adopter is already registered or required fields are missing.
      Parameters:
      adopter - the adopter to register

    • update

      void update(Adopter adopter)
      Updates the information of an existing adopter record. Throws an exception if the adopter is not found in the system.
      Parameters:
      adopter - the adopter with updated information

    • remove

      void remove(Adopter adopter)
      Removes an adopter from the system. Throws an exception if the adopter is not found or has a pending adoption request.
      Parameters:
      adopter - the adopter to remove

    • listAll

      List<Adopter> listAll()
      Returns all adopters currently registered in the system. Returns an empty list if no adopters are registered.
      Returns:
      a list of all registered adopters

    • findById

      Adopter findById(String id)
      Returns the adopter with the given ID. Throws an exception if no adopter with that ID is found.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier of the adopter
      Returns:
      the matching adopter

    • registeredAfter

      List<Adopter> registeredAfter(LocalDate date)
      Returns all adopters who registered after the given date. Returns an empty list if no adopters registered after that date.
      Parameters:
      date - the cutoff date (exclusive)
      Returns:
      a list of adopters registered after the date

    • adoptedAfter

      List<Adopter> adoptedAfter(LocalDate date)
      Returns all adopters who have at least one approved adoption after the given date. Returns an empty list if no such adopters exist.
      Parameters:
      date - the cutoff date (exclusive)
      Returns:
      a list of adopters with an approved adoption after the date

    • adoptedAnimal

      List<Adopter> adoptedAnimal(Animal animal)
      Returns all adopters who have adopted the given animal. Returns an empty list if no adopter has adopted the animal.
      Parameters:
      animal - the animal to query
      Returns:
      a list of adopters who adopted the animal
